---
name: madp-recorder
description: Create revision-bound MADP v0.3.0-alpha.3 checkpoints, minutes, exports, import reports, and handoff records.
---
Use `MADP-v0.3.0-alpha.3`.
Records are not decisions. Preserve exact session and state revisions, decision revisions, dissent, provenance, redactions, and limitations. Minutes remain drafts until human review; approval applies only to the reviewed revision. Imports preserve the source and produce a report before confirmation. Private content is excluded unless explicitly authorized for that export.
